scope: Metro Manila / NCR address disaster risk assessor

validated_sources.name: PHIVOLCSPublic ActiveFault MapServer layer
validated_sources.mvp_use: nearest active-fault distance after local spatial filtering

validated_sources.name: PHIVOLCSPublic Liquefaction MapServer layer
validated_sources.check: returnCountOnly=true plus layer metadata inspected during research run

validated_sources.name: MGBPublic Flood MapServer layer
validated_sources.mvp_use: point-in-polygon flood susceptibility where Metro Manila coverage exists

validated_sources.name: MMDA Flood-Prone Areas FeatureServer layer
validated_sources.mvp_use: nearest historical flood-prone point and city-filtered flood history

validated_sources.name: MMDA River FeatureServer layer
validated_sources.mvp_use: nearest river or waterway distance as flood/drainage context

validated_sources.name: BetterGov Project NOAH Hazard Maps dataset
validated_sources.mvp_use: national hazard-zone layer package, with Metro Manila filtering

validated_sources.name: BetterGov Project NOAH PMTiles resource
validated_sources.mvp_use: tile-backed hazard lookup after PMTiles schema inspection

validated_sources.name: BetterGov flood dataset search
validated_sources.mvp_use: discover flood hazard and infrastructure proxy datasets

validated_sources.name: HDX Philippines Subnational Administrative Boundaries
validated_sources.mvp_use: NCR, city, and barangay joins for address packets

validation_notes: Large PMTiles, SHP, GeoJSON, GPKG, and PBF files were not downloaded during this check.
HazardHunterPH, FaultFinder, LGU pages, and FOI pages are treated as manual/reference unless a public API contract is documented.
Waste-management quality remains weakly sourced; only use explicit official schedules, complaints, FOI releases, or drainage/flood proxies with caveats.
